name: Tagliatelle with Caviar and Cream
recipeIngredient: A couple of sage leaves or
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the heavy cream into a saucepan.
2. Add the caviar to the saucepan.
3. Heat over low heat for 10 minutes without boiling.
4. Stir in butter, sage (or dried sage powder), and cognac.
5. Cook for an additional 2 minutes on low heat.
6. Serve hot over cooked tagliatelle with grated cheese on top.
7. This dish is excellent as a starter for a fish dinner or as a side dish.
